reference: Bati nviã ĩye be ɛlalɛ bɛnyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ lɔkɔa bati nkaɛ a bɛsa fɔlɛtsa a kĩ baalɛ a kamɛ.
hypothesis: bɛ tin vian yɛ bɛlɛ lɛ bɛnyɛ ba gbɔn nupɛ. Ɔkwa bɛ tin ka bɛ sa flɛɛca ki bɛ lɛɛ akɛ.

reference: Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi deĩ nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ kĩ ɛtɛ kanyɛkatsa etomɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃ ni, owula kĩ ɛlamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ a ɛfɔ̃ kalɛ.
hypothesis: nenme. nde odidde ne kachnakon, ti ette kanyekacha etumana bagu masekeni. Obulaki elamanako jlakale a efokale

reference: Mi a flee míapuli milɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa ɔmɔa ɔmɔa ayekĩ odi nyɛ odi aakɔlɛ fɔtsa ɛkɔa foe edo ye akũ kɔbɛ̃.
hypothesis: Miya fəre miya fəre mi le ba gu mi fəre ca òmwa òmwa. Aiki òdinyi òdi a kwələ fəca èkwa fu e do ye akuṅkɔbɛ.

reference: Bikĩ banyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ a bipuli bipi be akũ nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ balɛ a kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma táwɛ kĩ bɔna nɛ ɔtutũ kamɛ mbom budzi nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ lukudɔ kamɛ.
hypothesis: Mekì bánya bágmúnúkúpyà, bípúlí bípíbíyákú, nɛ fólɛcà àkìbálɛ àkámɛ. Kítùnɛkí bágmátàwé kìbónà nɛ òtútúkámɛ, mbóm-bújìné òmòàkàkínà mólúkúdókámɛ.

reference: Ade aye kɛnɛ kĩ fɔna nɛ Baguma tɛsɔli a flee kamɛ a.
hypothesis: Adéyé kene kifon na, naba gumate soli ya flika me.

reference: Kɛnɛ kĩ batsole bɛkɛna dĩĩ nɛ fɔtsɛnakɔ̃.
hypothesis: kɛnɛkɛ bɛɛtʃɔlɛbɛ kɛnɛdi na fɔtʃɛnɛ

reference: Bɛtákpa be osi kĩ balɛ kɔdzɛla, ade Yudafɔ mbla lɛmɛ tsa kĩ bɛtanya lɔtɔ nɛ adzuma adima kamɛ a.
hypothesis: beta bye biosi ki balle kojala, anye yuda fom lalami chaki, betanya lotoni ajumadi makami

reference: Ntɛ bɛwɛ kĩ banyi litsedi kamɛ ni bivia be banyɔ nɛ kɔla.
hypothesis: Mtebɛɛ wɛɛkíi banyi likyɛ́li kamɛni. Mivyaabɛ banyo nekɔ.

reference: Fɔnyɛ kɔnyɔã fɔkpa otsole kĩ yalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ batɛ badonɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a.
hypothesis: Fonya konywa fopɔɔchuleki yala kojila ni batte badune kachanako.

reference: Mi sɛkɛ̃ Baguma kalɛ a nɛ kito mbɔɛɛ?
hypothesis: Mì sé kɛ, ba gu má ka liɛ nɛ kì túmbwɛ.
